q: Would you like to see more public places near where you live?
examiner_note: Nói về mong muốn phát triển khu vực lân cận. Sử dụng 'public square', 'within walking distance', 'encourage', 'vibrant'.

band7.text: Absolutely. Having a public square or a small community garden within walking distance would be a wonderful addition to the neighborhood and would encourage more people to spend time outdoors and interact with each other.
band7.note: Sử dụng cụm từ hay (within walking distance) và giải thích lợi ích.

band8.text: I’d definitely support that. I think our local area would greatly benefit from more communal spaces where people could gather and relax. It would help to create a more vibrant and social atmosphere and make the neighborhood a much more attractive place to live.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng hay (communal, gather, vibrant, social atmosphere).

band9.text: I’m a firm believer in the importance of accessible public spaces for community well-being. Having more well-maintained parks or plazas within my immediate vicinity would not only enhance my quality of life but also foster a stronger sense of social cohesion and community identity among residents.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng ở mức độ cao (firm believer, accessible, immediate vicinity, enhance, social cohesion).

v.example: There are no shops in the immediate vicinity.
Public spaces play a key role in social cohesion.

advanced_vocab.example: There is a park in the vicinity of the school.

similar_questions: What kind of public places do you have near your house?
